policy: Use the newest stable complete ecosystem-compatible dependency graph. Independent package maxima do not override verified framework-tooling compatibility. Automated-test infrastructure is absent by owner policy; validation uses static governance, typecheck, production build, audits, and narrow real-browser evidence.

compatibilityException.rationale: Current stable Vue Language Tools and vue-tsc require the stable TypeScript programmatic API and cannot consume the compatibility shim.
compatibilityException.reviewTrigger: Stable Vue Language Tools, vue-tsc, and the ESLint TypeScript stack support TypeScript 7.
compatibilityException.removalCondition: Full static governance, Vue SFC typecheck, production build, audit, narrow real-browser validation, and owner acceptance pass.

validationPolicy.runtimeArchitectureImpact: The policy does not alter the selected Vue runtime architecture.
